ui.warning.cleardata.title: Clear Data
ui.warning.cleardata.text:
This action will clear all of your collection, player and run data. It will not clear your achievements, stats or leaderboard placements.
This action is irreversible. Are you sure?
ui.warning.tutorial.title: Tutorial
ui.warning.tutorial.text:
This action will load the battle tutorial.
Do you wish to continue?
ui.warning.tutorial.firsttime.title: Tutorial
ui.warning.tutorial.firsttime.text:
It appears it is your first time playing the game!
Would you like to play the tutorial first?
ui.warning.emptydeck.title: Empty Deck
ui.warning.emptydeck.text:
Your deck is empty! You will have no cards to draw from.
Are you sure you wish to continue?
ui.warning.alpha.title: Alpha Build
ui.warning.alpha.text:
You are playing an alpha build of the game.
The game is still in active development and contains bugs, incomplete features and placeholder assets.
Run data may be reset at any point without prior notice.
Click here to join our discord server to report bugs and get updates on development!
ui.warning.version.title: Version Mismatch
ui.warning.version.text:
This run was saved on a separate game version.
It could be corrupted or have unexpected bugs.
Are you sure you wish to load it?
ui.warning.deleterun.title: Delete Run Data
ui.warning.deleterun.text:
This action will delete the provided run data.
Are you sure?
ui.warning.rewardsunclaimed.title: Unclaimed Rewards
ui.warning.rewardsunclaimed.text:
You have unclaimed rewards!
Are you sure you wish to continue without claiming them?
ui.warning.moddedrun_invalidmods.title: Invalid Mods
ui.warning.moddedrun_invalidmods.text:
This run uses mods that are not currently enabled. This may cause instability or crashes.

Are you sure you wish to continue?

Expected Mods:
{0}
ui.warning.unequippedrelics.title: Unequipped Relics
ui.warning.unequippedrelics.text:
You have relics that are not currently equipped.
These relics will not provide their effects during this battle.
Head to the team management screen to equip them?
